LoginPage.title: Sign in
LoginPage.description: Use GitHub to open a PostgreSQL-backed session.

ReservationPage.heading: Reservation date range demo
ReservationPage.helper: This example keeps validation, blocked days and proxy submission at the UI boundary while the backend remains the owner of availability logic.
ReservationPage.locationDescription: Simple boundary field wired through the shared Zod contract.
ReservationPage.timezoneDescription: Captured from the browser and forwarded to NestJS without adding business rules in Next.js.
ReservationPage.dateRangeDescription: Blocked days come from a fixture here, but the field stays ready for API-driven availability.
ReservationPage.submitError: Reservation proxy failed. Verify the NestJS availability endpoint or RENTAL_API_BASE_URL.
ReservationPage.mapDescription: Leaflet stays behind one SSR-safe wrapper while the route remains a Server Component and Motion lives only in leaf clients.
ReservationPage.mapEmpty: Pickup points will appear here once the UI fixture or API source is available.

BookingNewPage.heading: Book a vehicle
BookingNewPage.helper: Select your travel dates. A deposit will be required to confirm the booking.
BookingNewPage.submitError: Failed to create booking. Please try again.
BookingNewPage.conflictError: This vehicle is already booked for the selected dates.

BookingDetailPage.heading: Booking details
BookingDetailPage.depositHelper: Pay the deposit below to confirm your booking.

VehicleCatalogPage.heading: Our fleet
VehicleCatalogPage.helper: Browse available rentals in Cancun. Prices are per day, all-included.
VehicleCatalogPage.emptyDescription: We're updating our catalog. Please check back shortly.
